description: A reseller partner contacts the channel manager with a technical question from a potential customer about API rate limits.

nodes.task_description: Receive the question from the partner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent understands the partner's technical question.

nodes.task_description: Look up the API rate limits for different subscription tiers in the product documentation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the exact rate limits for each plan.

nodes.task_description: Provide a clear and accurate answer back to the partner so they can respond to their lead.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent empowers the partner to continue their sales process.
